reasoning_content: We need to determine if 359 is prime. Check divisibility: sqrt(359) ≈ 18.9. Check primes up to 19: 2,3,5,7,11,13,17,19. 359 is odd, not divisible by 2. Sum digits 3+5+9=17, not divisible by 3. Last digit not 0 or 5, so not divisible by 5. For 7: 7*51=357, remainder 2, so not divisible. For 11: 11*32=352, remainder 7; not divisible. For 13: 13*27=351, remainder 8; not divisible. For 17: 17*21=357, remainder 2; not divisible. For 19: 19*18=342, remainder 17; not divisible. So 359 is prime. Answer yes.
